title: Certificate of fitness
doc_html:
§713.  Certificate of fitness

If, after instruction required by R.S. 45:711, the applicant is found qualified, the last instructor shall issue him a certificate of fitness showing his competency either as motorman or conductor.
doc_text:
§713.  Certificate of fitness
If, after instruction required by R.S. 45:711, the applicant is found qualified, the last instructor shall issue him a certificate of fitness showing his competency either as motorman or conductor.
